Bespoke Corporate Gifting

Gifts, rooted
in thought.

Ashwatta designs and delivers corporate gifting that feels personal — from a new hire's first welcome kit to the hamper that arrives every Diwali. Chosen with care, made in your brand, delivered anywhere in India.

The Name
"In Sanskrit, Ashwatta is the sacred fig — a tree said to have no true beginning or end, its roots and branches always reaching toward each other. We took the name because a good gift works the same way: it keeps a relationship growing, long after the day it was given."
What We Craft

Eight ways to say thank you, well.

Bespoke Crockery & Drinkware

Mugs, cups and tableware customised in your colours — for desks, boardrooms and client tables.

Executive Stationery & Desk Pieces

Notebooks, pens and desk accessories that make a new title feel earned.

Company Badges & Brooches

Small metal pieces, precisely made, for the people who represent your name.

Corporate Accessories

Bags, organisers and everyday carry, branded without shouting about it.

Corporate Event Return Gifts

Something guests actually keep, chosen to match the evening.

Festive Hampers

Diwali, New Year and beyond — curated boxes that feel personal, not generic.

Welcome Kits

The first impression a new hire unpacks on day one.

Uniform Design & Development

From concept to fitting, uniforms that carry your brand with dignity.

How We Work

Three steps, no surprises.

01

Understand

We start with your brand, budget and occasion — not a catalogue.

02

Craft

Samples, sign-off and small-batch production, checked by hand.

03

Deliver

Packed, labelled and delivered on schedule, anywhere in India.

Ashwatta didn't just send our team a gift — they sent something people still ask us about, months later.
